directions.reason: Roadmap section 6 calls for a 14-field evidence_ledger_entry with six validator invariants before any claims are accumulated.
Roadmap section 6.2 explicitly rejects the 'RAG access leads to better performance' framing; the contribution must be the ledger contract, not a retrieval benchmark.
P2.1 signal fusion is repositioned as evidence-input layer (roadmap section 8); same-direction work would compete with the deployed P2.1 harness.
Too broad for the 14-day mainline plan; scope must stay on Gulei-class emergency scenarios plus Polymarket/Gulei settlement.
Gulei 2015 incident has 14 documented policy timepoints (per 09-gulei-retrospective-validation.md) that can map onto settlement_rule; Polymarket excluded for M2 due to illiquid chemical-event markets

diversity_rule: every new direction must differ from every prior entry on at least one of {hypothesis, method, data source, evaluation metric}
